app.name: Sottobicchiere
app.tagline: Games and socialising at your table
app.description: Gaming PWA for bars and venues: multiplayer games with your table's QR code

welcome.scan_title: Scan the QR code at your table
welcome.scan_description: Scan the QR code on the table to join or create a game session.
welcome.privacy_note: No account needed. Your data is not saved.
welcome.mobile_qr_hint: If you are already on your phone, use the button above.
welcome.create_room_description: At home, in the park or at the club: create your own game table and let others join.

room.new_description: Spin up a space on the fly and let others join via QR, link or code. No account, fully temporary.
room.create_error: Could not create the table. Please try again.
room.create_success_toast: Table created! Share it with others.
room.share_description: Share one of these so others can join.
room.privacy_note: The table is anonymous and temporary: it deletes itself after a few hours.
room.join_description: Enter the 6-character code that was shared with you.
room.invalid_code: Invalid code: it must be 6 characters.
room.not_found: Table not found: the code may be wrong or expired.

table.qr_instruction: Scan the QR code with your phone, or tap the link below.
table.invalid_qr_description: This QR code is not recognized or has expired. Ask the venue staff.
table.group_hint: Play as a team with friends at your table
table.join_error_generic: Unexpected error while joining. Check your connection and try again.
table.active_sessions_empty: No active groups. Create the first one!

lobby.no_players: No players yet. You're the first!
lobby.games_description: Multiplayer mini-games will be available soon.
lobby.game_host_only: Only the host can select a game.
lobby.dating_toggle_hint: Send and receive anonymous messages from other tables
lobby.game_select_error_toast: Could not select game. Please try again in a moment.
lobby.leave_error_toast: Error while leaving lobby. Please try again.

thumbs.title: Thumbs Up
thumbs.description: Vote 👍 or 👎 on opinion questions and challenge your friends!
thumbs.waiting_description: Wait for everyone to connect, then start the game.
thumbs.need_players: You need at least 2 players to start.
thumbs.waiting_host: Waiting for the host to advance to the next round…

word_blitz.title: Word Blitz
word_blitz.description: Say a word fast: quick warm-up before full realtime matches.
word_blitz.prompt: Write a word starting with letter:
word_blitz.local_note: Local prototype mode: next step will make this realtime for the table.
